svg.title: Types of Random Number Generators
svg.desc: A structural diagram showing TRNG and PRNG (statistical and cryptographic) types, their characteristics and use cases.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is a random number generator?')
sendPrompt('How does a True Random Number Generator work?')
sendPrompt('How does a Pseudorandom Number Generator work?')
sendPrompt('What physical sources do TRNGs use?')
sendPrompt('What are TRNG use cases in cryptography?')
sendPrompt('What are the limitations of TRNG?')
sendPrompt('What is a statistical PRNG and when is it used?')
sendPrompt('What makes a CSPRNG cryptographically secure?')
sendPrompt('Why is statistical PRNG risky for security?')
sendPrompt('What are examples of statistical PRNGs?')
